value.rationale: The page describes managing allow and deny (block) rules for network access. The network policy uses an allowlist-first model with `allow` and `deny` rules (e.g. `domains = { "api.openai.com" = "allow", "example.com" = "deny" }`), where "deny always wins over allow." This substantiates the claim of managing an allowlist and blocklist for Codex network access.
